# Resource (hush_redis_access_privilege)

Manage Redis access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a Redis access privilege
resource "hush_redis_access_privilege" "example" {
  name        = "app-cache-access"
  description = "Read/write access to cache keys"

  grants {
    type   = "category"
    action = "include"
    name   = "read"
  }

  grants {
    type   = "category"
    action = "include"
    name   = "write"
  }

  keys     = ["cache:*", "session:*"]
  channels = ["notifications:*"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `grants` (Block List, Min: 1) The list of Redis ACL grant entries (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--grants))
- `keys` (List of String, Min: 1) The key patterns this privilege applies to (e.g., "*", "cache:*")
- `name` (String) The name of the Redis access privilege

### Optional

- `channels` (List of String) The Pub/Sub channel patterns this privilege applies to
- `description` (String) The description of the Redis access privilege

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Redis access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege

<a id="nestedblock--grants"></a>
### Nested Schema for `grants`

Required:

- `action` (String) The action for this grant entry (`include` or `exclude`)
- `name` (String) The name of the Redis command or category (e.g., `read`, `write`, `get`, `set`)
- `type` (String) The type of grant entry (`category` or `command`)
